_README: Per-tool demo GIFs for the guide. Optional — without this file, the page auto-shows tool-<slug>.gif and tool-<slug>-1.gif, -2.gif, … if present. Use this to control order + add a caption under each clip. Key = tool slug (printed to the browser console on the guide page). Value = array of 'file.gif' strings (file lives in docs/img/) OR {"file": "x.gif", "caption": "..."} objects. A slug listed here OVERRIDES the auto-probing for that tool. Files that don't exist yet just hide themselves, so it's safe to list them ahead of recording.

flight-path-editor.caption: Draw under-vertexed — each segment auto-bands from the terrain underneath.
Hold Alt to peek the ground + AGL under any point of the path.
Auto-step adds vertices where the ground varies too much.
Click a segment number to insert a vertex mid-segment.

site-setup-generator-ffz-previewer.caption: Generate auto-builds inspection FFZs + shielded paths and previews them.
Tune the standoff / size / altitudes, then commit through the Apply queue.
